name: sux-life
description: The digital-life memory layer — a skill that turns the sux vault + mail connectors into a personal memory system: capture a thought in seconds, remember a durable fact/person/decision, recall across your notes + mail + files + the web with citations, and consolidate it all into a linked knowledge graph. Git is the undo, so it writes unblocked. Rides on the one sux connector's /vault/mcp and /mail/mcp routes; no new infra.
